summary: Classified #92474 as the canonical open issue for this cluster. No close, merge, post-merge close, or fix-PR action is safe or allowed: the only actionable hydrated item is the canonical issue, linked PRs #92484 and #92491 are explicitly excluded overlap context and are not hydrated preflight targets, and job permissions block merge/fix/raise_pr.

actions.reason: #92474 remains the best live canonical issue. The bug appears real on current main, but this close-only/dedupe cleanup job has allow_fix_pr=false, allow_merge=false, and allow_post_merge_close=false, so the correct cluster action is to keep the canonical issue open.
